title: Implement SourceAdapter protocol, envelope and registry
requirements: Create SourceObjectEnvelope as a validated dataclass or equivalent structured object.
Create SourceAdapter protocol with iter_changed_objects, get_object, render_envelope, can_access and extract_analytics_facts hooks.
Create adapter registry with explicit registration by source_code.
Reserve source_sequence and previous_content_hash for future event mode.
Do not require event bus or outbox in this task.
Keep adapter errors observable and fail closed for adapter_check sources.
